A_nba_structural.irreducible_ceiling_note: even with strengths known EXACTLY the favorite wins only 42% — the other 58% is irreducible playoff variance no model can remove
A_nba_structural.reframe: the composite's 52% was overconfident; the structural sim quantifies the real, mostly-irreducible uncertainty of a bracket

B_time_calibration.reading: with the REAL per-year volatility the 80% interval covers ~80% -> time is calibrated; a clock 2x too fast or 2x too slow breaks coverage. The engine's sqrt(dt) diffusion reproduces the closed-form spread.

C_compiled_social.reading: leans loss but genuinely uncertain: the vote interval straddles 0.5 and the spread is ~95% irreducible campaign noise — the honest output is a wide distribution, not a false-confident point
